title: The Promise Becomes Shared
description: On pages 16–19, this part focuses on the promise becomes shared, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Promise Becomes Shared. Luffy refuses to let Vivi carry the country alone, forcing her to face what it will actually take to stop Crocodile. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't you ever say that to me again or I won't forgive you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's exactly what I'm trying so hard to prevent!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The rebels! The Royalist forces! And even the citizens! None of them did anything wrong so why do they have to die!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The only one at fault here is crocodile!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Then why the hell are you willingly putting your own life at risk!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hey Luffy! You're going too far!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy, you son of a-

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Even I can tell from a single glance,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What did you say!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: about what needs to be done the most in this country!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yuba will never be the defeated by the likes of sand...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You think risking your life alone is gonna be enough!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then what else can I risk!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I will... Never forgive that man!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You could at the very least risk our lives too!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I thought we were friends!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I don't have any- thing else to ri-

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...So you were hiding it all along, weren't you...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll stop the rebels no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You still do have some tears left in you.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Truth be told,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You're the one who most wants to beat him up, right...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So tell me...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Tell me where crocodile is...!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: For most

summary: This part develops the promise becomes shared and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
